<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Logging\TeamCity\Subscriber; use Pest\Logging\TeamCity\TeamCityLogger; /** * @internal */ abstract class Subscriber // @pest-arch-ignore-line { /** * Creates a new Subscriber instance. */ public function __construct(private readonly TeamCityLogger $logger) {} /** * Creates a new TeamCityLogger instance. */ final protected function logger(): TeamCityLogger // @pest-arch-ignore-line { return $this->logger; } }
